About a year ago, this was my favorite game. Loved the different modes and it was the only game I got on. But I thought there would be more updates than there actually was. The people that I play with also agree.

1. You need map changes.
You can’t expect people to play your game when the only thing you update are cosmetics. Also, the new map you added to replace the one before is too big, doesn’t make any sense, and the chests never come as often as they did.

2.(Not related) You need to have something different than from other games. For instance, if you added like a sandbox, where people can make their own maps to do whatever they want to with. 

3. I’m really happy for this game. Just please change some stuff, to get your players back.

Thank you.
